instructions: Use the provider package comments as the source of truth for package ownership boundaries. Flag changes that move GCE VM lifecycle, GKE cluster API reads, source node-pool selection, or bootstrap metadata mutation into the wrong provider package.

rules.rule: Provider changes should respect package ownership: instance owns GCE VM lifecycle and instance labels/tags; nodepooltemplate owns bootstrap source pool/template discovery; gke owns shared GKE cluster facts; metadata owns pure GKE bootstrap metadata transformations.
Bootstrap metadata helpers should remain pure transformations and should not make GCP API calls or mutate shared Compute metadata templates in place.
